description: Retrieve the MOTD/banner from a NETCONF-enabled network device

host.description: Device host or IP address when not using _target

private_key.description: Private key file or key data when not using _target

install_dependencies.description: Allow the task to install required Python dependencies if missing

host_key_check.description: Verify host key for NETCONF SSH

device_type.description: Device type used to select the NETCONF filter

filter.description: Custom NETCONF subtree filter to override the default device filter
